race.comment: AMICAL (3) was well supported when resuming last start over 1200m at Balaklava and gave a bold sight before tiring late into fourth. Is sure to have come on from that and can get the job done this time. CHAMPAGNE LADIES (5) produced a solid effort on debut in better company last start at Moe. Gets in light with the 3kg claimer engaged and is another likely improver that holds winning claims. BUTTERFLY ISLAND (4) is a three-year-old filly on debut from the stable of Tom Dabernig. By Kermadec from Kirinia. Strips fitter for two trials and is drawn cosy on the inside. Can make a bright start. CHAPPA (1) is a son of Valentia out of Quiddick having his first start. Should take a lot from a placing in a recent Port Augusta trial with today's rider Andrew Stead aboard. Worth keeping safe. STAFF WRITER (9) is a Written By filly on debut and is another that has shown enough in her lead-up work to suggest she can play a role.
